hero.name: AYUSHMAN
hero.headline: Open-Source Maintainer & Platform Engineer
hero.subhead: GitHub Maintainer Advisory for Pollinations.ai · Product Engineer @ Myceli AI
hero.intro: I build the automation, release engineering, and developer tooling that keep large open-source projects running — contributor pipelines, CI/CD, and deployment infrastructure.

intro.description: Discover the ancient wisdom of Ayurveda, delve into the practices of Yoga, and explore natural remedies for a healthier lifestyle.

websiteSection.designedBy: The idea of this site was inspired from Miranda, and is coded by Ayushman. Thanks to Nicolo-Miranda for the design inspiration, the image credits goes to Elixpo-Art. I would love to thank Pollinations.ai for being such an awesome community which I am currently a part of (2023-). Extending thanks to all my dear visitors who stumbled upon this page, and reading this section, you made my day! Do explore more of this site! Thank you for visiting.
websiteSection.futurePlans: The suite is planned to connect all the elixpo projects as a sitemap keeping this as the entry point in the development series of elixpo. This is a college project series personally for me as a documentation of the progress of 4 years of what I did in development! Hoping that you guys would like the attempt and explore the site for better details and attributes, much love. With time and development the Elixpo Series has got love from a lot of users worldwide, and I am really happy to see that. I hope you like the site and the projects (you will find them in the projects route) do give it a visit and share your feedbacks with me! Thank you for visiting.
websiteSection.codeStory:
Initially I used to procrastinate a lot on stuffs which made me ponder on living the moment with something productive. Elixpo series was made to collaborate with my peers who were interested in development alongside with me! I am really happy to be able to colla in this journey.

I really wanna mention a thanks to Vivek Yadav & Anwesha Chakraborty who has been a core-development member for the Elixpo projects so far, they really helped me think and reshape the ideas and sometimes through direct code contributions! Huge shout-out to my homies!

The portfolio has links to the other sections of the site like the projects, publications and the abouts. I duely requests you dear visitor to give it a visit from the navbar, it would mean a lot to me. Expecting more projects with time, hoping to make a complete micro-system.

techSection.heading: THE TECHY SYNAPSE
techSection.description: As a solo developer for a consistent period of time, I had the pleasure of exploring a lot of strategic moves in development, which made me explore different sections rather than just focusing on one! I believe that for building a complete project, one must start from the pen and paper, and work upto scalability and deployment. In the mid way also keeping the working ecosystem clean for better user-experience. With my 7+ years in development and being with a number of notable individuals and organizations, I have been able to explore a lot of technologies and frameworks, which I am really happy about.
